name: Greek Lamb on Skewers (Arni Souvlakia)
recipeIngredient: 4 To 5 lb leg of lamb; boned and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onions into quarters and separate layers.
2. Cut peppers into quarters, then cut each quarter in half.
3. In a shallow roasting pan, combine all ingredients except tomatoes, mixing well to ensure the meat is completely coated.
4. Marinate in the refrigerator for several hours.
5. Take out of the refrigerator and let sit at room temperature for about 20 minutes before cooking.
6. Before cooking, add tomatoes to the marinade and mix well to coat with juices.
7. Place meat cubes on skewers, alternating with green pepper slices, onion slices, and tomato wedges.
8. Lay the skewers in the pan with the marinade, turning several times.
9. Put the lamb on a rack over the pan containing the marinade and place under preheated broiler.
10. Turn several times during cooking and baste with marinade from the pan.
11. Cooking time depends on your taste; for medium rare, allow about 15-18 minutes.
12. Serve skewers on plates with rice pilaf. Alternatively, you can barbecue lamb using the marinade as the basting sauce. This is always the way we cook this dish—rain or shine.
13. Check doneness of lamb at about 10 minutes; if not done to your liking, cook further until done.
